extension.description: Use models from your OpenAI-compatible AI relay directly in the Copilot Chat model picker.
command.deleteConnection: WeaveNet: Delete Relay Connection and API Key
command.clearAllConnections: WeaveNet: Clear All Relay Connections and API Keys
configuration.title: WeaveNet for Copilot
configuration.activeProfile.description: Active WeaveNet Relay connection. Stored globally; leave empty only when no connection has been configured.
configuration.profiles.description: Named global connection profiles. A profile overrides the relay URL, extra headers, model filters, and fixed models. Each profile has one API key stored only in VS Code SecretStorage. Extra header values are regular VS Code settings and must not contain secrets. Delete commands permanently remove the corresponding API key.
configuration.anthropicVersion.descripti: Anthropic protocol version header sent when calling /messages for Claude models.
configuration.openaiPromptCaching.descri: Send a stable prompt_cache_key for GPT models to improve OpenAI-compatible prompt cache routing.
configuration.openaiPromptCacheKey.descr: Optional override for the GPT prompt_cache_key. Leave empty to use a stable key derived from the current workspace.
configuration.claudePromptCaching.automa: Enable Anthropic prompt caching on system, tools, and the latest two user-message cache breakpoints.
configuration.claudePromptCaching.disabl: Do not send cache_control for Claude requests.
configuration.claudePromptCaching.descri: Claude prompt caching mode. Automatic adds safe cache breakpoints to stable prefixes and recent user turns.
configuration.claudePromptCachingTTL.des: Anthropic prompt cache lifetime. 1h may improve long-running agent sessions but can cost more than 5m.
configuration.temperature.description: Optional sampling temperature sent to both OpenAI-compatible and Claude requests. Omit to use the model default.
configuration.topP.description: Optional nucleus-sampling top_p sent to both OpenAI-compatible and Claude requests. Omit to use the model default.
configuration.requestTimeoutSeconds.desc: Maximum seconds to wait for relay response headers. GET model discovery is retried once; chat POST requests are never blindly retried.
configuration.streamIdleTimeoutSeconds.d: Maximum seconds to wait between streamed response chunks before treating the stream as incomplete.
configuration.models.description: Legacy fallback fixed model definitions used when the active profile omits models. Prefer configuring models in the profile.
configuration.debug.description: Write redacted request summaries and Claude cache usage to the WeaveNet output channel. API keys and prompt text are never logged.
configuration.modelNamePrefix.descriptio: Display prefix for models shown in Copilot Chat.
configuration.includeModels.description: Legacy fallback regular expressions used when the active profile omits includeModels. Prefer configuring filters in the profile.
configuration.excludeModels.description: Legacy fallback regular expressions used when the active profile omits excludeModels. Prefer configuring filters in the profile.
configuration.maxInputTokens.description: Hard upper limit for input tokens advertised to Copilot. Lower this when an upstream OAuth model accepts less context than its model metadata reports.
configuration.maxOutputTokens.descriptio: Max output token count advertised to Copilot and optionally sent as max_tokens.
configuration.sendMaxTokens.description: Send max_tokens with chat completion requests.
configuration.supportsToolCalling.descri: Advertise tool calling support for relay models.
configuration.supportsImageInput.descrip: Advertise image input support. Enable only if your relay and target models accept image parts in OpenAI chat completions.
configuration.imageInputModels.descripti: Optional regular expressions that force image input on matching models. Model metadata is detected automatically from sub2api and OpenRouter.
configuration.disabledImageInputModels.d: Regular expressions that disable image input even when public metadata says a model supports it. Empty by default.
configuration.metadataRefreshHours.descr: How often to refresh cached OpenRouter model metadata, in hours.
configuration.requestHeaders.description: Legacy fallback headers used when the active profile omits requestHeaders. Values are stored as regular VS Code settings, not SecretStorage. Do not put API keys or other secrets here.
